surface_verification.justification: Compliance-metadata correction (append-only event_amended overlays); no web/cli/api app surface. End-to-end verification = the real compliance producer regen asserting Control Grade A + reconciliation green, plus a 4955-test regression sweep across all event-log/compliance-consuming suites.

behaviors.behavior: 7 events re-tagged to FR-01.10 (+FR-01.07 on the 2 AR-10 events) via event_amended overlays
behaviors.evidence: post-overlay rule-replay sim on the real 262-line worktree log: recent FR-tag 3/30->10/30, all-time 18.0%->21.0%; overlays applied 7/7 (record_event success)

behaviors.behavior: FR-tag decline cleared -> honesty-gate B-cap lifts -> Control Grade A
behaviors.evidence: real producer (update_compliance.py): baseline dashboard 'B (89/100) Capped: traceability declining'; post-finalize regen asserts grade A (confirmed at F5b)

behaviors.behavior: Reconciliation dimension stays green (FR-01.10 + FR-01.07 RECONCILED)
behaviors.evidence: sim ratio 1.0 with the F5b verify event; real RTM Reconciled? column + change_reconciliation dimension in the post-finalize dashboard

behaviors.behavior: The F5b verify event is load-bearing for the newest (tests.total=0) re-tagged touch
behaviors.evidence: stress-test sim WITHOUT the verify event: reconciliation ratio drops to 0.6, FR-01.10/FR-01.07 NEEDS_REVERIFICATION
F0 full sweep of all event-log/compliance-consuming suites: 4955 passed, 0 failed (compliance 922, shared 3602+196+61, integration 174)

behaviors.behavior: Genuine infra events stay no-FR (not over-tagged)
behaviors.evidence: stay-list (scorecard CI, bloat-baseline, drift-detector removal, events_log doc, ci-security refresh) excluded from the overlay set; all-time FR-tag rose only +3.4pp, confirming targeted correction

degraded: F0 scope: ran every suite that consumes the event log / FR / compliance machinery (compliance plugin + 3 shared dirs + integration = 4955 tests). The other 13 plugin suites test their own code and were not re-run because this iterate has zero .py diff (append-only events.jsonl + regenerated compliance artifacts). CI runs the full per-plugin matrix as the backstop.
